description: Versioned CI fleet manifest: maps every CI-enforced requirement to the named runner class that enforces it, its build flavor, tier, and red-X policy. A gate whose runner class is not yet provisioned is marked advisory (never silently green). Validated in CI by tools/check_fleet_manifest.py (the 'CI consumes it' tie); the human-readable companion is docs/ci-fleet-manifest.md.

gh-ubuntu-shared.notes: GitHub-hosted Linux. Shared, NOT perf-isolated — cannot host an R-QA-009 perf floor.

gh-macos-shared.notes: GitHub-hosted macOS. Doubles as the interim macOS build agent (R-BUILD-007); a dedicated agent is a follow-up.

gh-windows-shared.notes: GitHub-hosted Windows. The only MSVC /W4 /WX signal (the local dev gate is Ninja+GCC).

perf-linux-bare-metal.notes: R-QA-009 minimal-v1 perf box (one bare-metal Linux, median-of-5, +/-10% band). NOT yet provisioned -> every gate mapped here is advisory until it is.

determinism-matrix.notes: R-QA-005 / L-54 state-hash determinism matrix (min Linux-x64, Win-x64, macOS-ARM64). Lands M6; advisory until provisioned.

gpu-runner.notes: M4 visual-equivalence gate needs a real GPU. Advisory until provisioned.

n-daemons-host.notes: R-FILE-011 N-daemons-on-one-box scenario: validates composed watcher/fd/index-memory/cache budgets. Advisory until provisioned.

gates.description: Deny-by-default dependency-license allowlist + SBOM emit (tools/check_licenses.py).
pytest over tools/tests + bench/tests (license gate, toolchain gate, corpus generator, perf gate, bench harness + daemons orchestration, budget-table extractor, fleet-manifest validator).
dev-preset build + ctest: the kernel, file-sync, and fault-injection-harness suites (M1-exit gate, R-QA-008).
dev-preset build + ctest on macOS (M1-exit gate, R-QA-008).
dev-preset build + ctest on Windows/MSVC (M1-exit gate + the only MSVC /W4 /WX signal).

M1 exit criterion 1 (issue #36): mutate a scene file via a CLI verb AND a raw text edit -> identical derived World headless, byte-identical derived state (ctest m1-exit-1-files-as-truth; runs on all three build-matrix legs via the 'M1 exit gate' step).

M1 exit criterion 2 (issue #36): a second CLI process attaches live to the running daemon over the real IPC wire via the capability-negotiation handshake (protocolMajor=0, hard-fail-on-mismatch) (ctest m1-exit-2-live-attach; all three build-matrix legs).

M1 exit criterion 3 (issue #36): real kill -9 of the real daemon process mid-multi-file-write, nothing lost — intent-log resume (HMAC-checked, re-jailed, re-CAS'd) + fresh snapshot on the new incarnationId (ctest m1-exit-3-crash-recovery; all three build-matrix legs).

M1 exit criterion 4 (issue #36): CLI ≡ RPC ≡ MCP ≡ introspection parity generated from the one registry — proven end-to-end over the real wire — plus the additive-only error-code catalog (R-CLI-008) (ctest m1-exit-4-contract-parity; all three build-matrix legs).

M1 exit criterion 5 (issue #36): a read/query-scoped token cannot install a package or trigger a build via DIRECT RPC — dispatcher-level denial mapping to catalog scope.denied, exit-class 6, verified over the real IPC transport (ctest m1-exit-5-scope-enforcement; all three build-matrix legs).
ASan+UBSan preset build + ctest (ubuntu/clang; non-MSVC-only).
ThreadSanitizer preset build + ctest (ubuntu/clang; grows real coverage with M1 threaded kernel code).

M0 parse-bench FILE-FORMAT baseline on the 10k corpus + canonical fixpoint smoke + the R-QA-009 perf gate (advisory: a shared runner is NOT perf-isolated, so the numbers do not gate). The real-pipeline per-PR proxy is bench-attach-10k.

The ROADMAP-§6-tiering per-PR 10k proxy (issue #38) on the REAL attach pipeline (filesync reconcile index + derivation graph + daemon boot; `context bench` subject): fresh + index-warm attach, single-edit, bulk scenarios + the R-FILE-011 per-stage budget-table extraction. The JOB is blocking (the real path must run green end to end); the perf NUMBERS stay advisory until perf-linux-bare-metal is provisioned (the in-job perf gate is continue-on-error).
wasmtime + WAMR interpreter smoke on all 3 OSes (blocking legs).
WAMR AOT smoke + target-pin guard (blocking; un-quarantined 2026-07-04 — #24 SIGILL root-caused to host-CPU wamrc codegen, fixed by the x86-64-v2 pin in spikes/wasm/CMakeLists.txt).
WebGPU spike native build + offscreen render/readback self-check on all 3 OSes (software adapter; skips cleanly where none).
WebGPU spike Emscripten/emdawnwebgpu wasm+JS build (in-browser render is a local step).
CI consumes this manifest: tools/check_fleet_manifest.py validates it against the live workflow every run (self-consistency + advisory-until-provisioned rule).

Full 100k-file fresh + index-warm attach floor under the R-QA-009 methodology. Runs nightly as an ADVISORY TREND on gh-ubuntu-shared (bench-nightly.yml) until this perf-isolated runner class is provisioned — the runner_class names the class that makes it a real floor (then blocking, nightly).

Session-query latency budget (p99 <= 5 ms local) measured at the daemon's bounded service point (full JSON-RPC dispatch, socket excluded) against a 100k-file derived world. Advisory trend on the shared runner until the perf box is provisioned.

Sustained-write-load dirty-set latency + backpressure policy measurement (the DOCUMENTED maximum dirty-set latency of docs/latency-budget-table.md, under the library-default coalescing config). Advisory trend until the perf box is provisioned.

Dense-reference synthetic (R-FILE-011(e): ref edges O(refs) > O(files)) attach on the real pipeline — the edge-heavy case exercised nightly at proxy size (the property under test is edges >> files, not absolute count).

Multi-worktree scenario home (the harness `daemons` scenario: N real daemons + N attach clients on one box). The R-FILE-010 SHARED-CACHE contention measurement activates when the M2 derivation cache lands; advisory until the runner class is provisioned.
L-54 state-hash determinism on the named wedge platforms with hierarchical-hash auto-triage. Lands M6; advisory until provisioned.
M4 visual-equivalence gate; needs a GPU runner. Advisory until provisioned.

N-daemons-on-one-box composed watcher/fd/index-memory/cache budget scenario (the harness `daemons` scenario: N real `context daemon` processes + N `context attach --reconcile` clients over the real wire). Runs nightly as concurrent boot/attach/reconcile trend on gh-ubuntu-shared; the composed watch-handle/fd budgets gain fidelity when the native watcher lands and this runner class is provisioned. Advisory until then.
